/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_all.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_constructor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_memory_allocation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_object_lifecycle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_pool_management.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_introspection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_edge_cases.cpp.o -o tests
